# Bull Or BS

> AI-driven stock analysis that shows its work. We audit popular stock
> recommendations, run AI elimination tournaments across sector peers, and
> summarize financial news in plain English — covering TSX, US, and emerging
> markets. Free, transparent, no paywall. Educational content, not financial
> advice.

Bull Or BS (bullorbs.com) publishes three content types, all AI-generated with
cited sources and a published methodology:

- Roasts: audits of stock recommendations from popular financial newsletters,
  scored 1-10 with full reasoning
- AI Picks: elimination tournaments comparing 10-15 stocks head-to-head on
  valuation, catalysts, risks, and momentum
- News Takes: plain-English summaries of verified financial news with source
  links — facts only, no speculation

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://bullorbs.com/): latest analysis and market movers
- [Stock pages](https://bullorbs.com/stock): per-ticker analysis pages at
  /stock/[ticker] (e.g. /stock/shop, /stock/nvda) with FAQ, sector peers, and
  every article covering that ticker
- [Roasts](https://bullorbs.com/roasts): stock recommendation audits
- [AI Picks](https://bullorbs.com/picks): tournament-style stock comparisons
- [News](https://bullorbs.com/takes): plain-English financial news takes
- [Daily Briefing](https://bullorbs.com/daily): morning digest across AI/tech,
  markets, Canada/TSX, and global categories
- [Learn](https://bullorbs.com/learn): Canadian investing guides (TFSA, RRSP,
  FHSA, dividend investing, buying US stocks from Canada)
- [Methodology](https://bullorbs.com/methodology): how the AI analysis works
- [Editorial standards](https://bullorbs.com/editorial): fact-checking and
  correction policy

## Feeds

- [RSS feed](https://bullorbs.com/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://bullorbs.com/sitemap.xml)
- [News sitemap](https://bullorbs.com/news-sitemap.xml)

## Notes

- All articles cite sources via numbered footnotes with links
- Content is educational analysis and opinion — never buy/sell directives
- Not affiliated with any financial publication or institution
